subcodes.first_line: O thou whose breast hath expanded through the breeze wafted from the gardens of thy Lord's bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انشرح صدره بنسیم هب من ریاض موهبة ربه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @being a source of light; guidance
